overview.title: Staff Software Engineer
overview.subtitle: Bridging low-level systems, GenAI, and reliable infrastructure for modern web products. Specializing in high-performance RAG pipelines and distributed vector database indexing.

about.p1: I am a Staff Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience building reliable, scalable systems. With a background spanning from low-level infrastructure to GenAI pipelines, I focus on clean architecture and pragmatic technical decisions.
about.p2: My core experience is centered around Go, Python, Rust, and TypeScript, complemented by vector databases like Pinecone and Milvus. I specialize in designing high-performance RAG pipelines, LLM-orchestrated agent frameworks, and distributed microservices.

contact.title: Contact.
contact.body: Tell me about your project, goals, or how I can help. I will respond within 1-2 business days.

education.title: Education
education.resumeDescription: Academic background focused on Computer Science and Engineering, with specialized coursework in Distributed Systems, Artificial Intelligence, and Advanced Algorithms.

items.degree: Master of Engineering (M.Eng.) in Computer Science
items.description: Specialized in Distributed Systems and AI. Thesis on scalable consensus protocols. GPA: 5.0/5.0.

items.degree: Bachelor of Science (B.S.) Computer Science, Universidade de São Paulo (USP)
items.description: Foundational Computer Science coursework with an emphasis on Data Structures, Operating Systems, and Network Security.

bullets: Lead scale out of vector database indexing and search pipelines using Rust and Go, achieving 10x throughput improvement
Designed multi-tenant orchestration layer using Kubernetes and custom controllers for dynamic resource allocation
Improved high-availability across global deployments by implementing a distributed consensus-based configuration service
Collaborated with researchers to optimize HNSW graph traversal, reducing search latency by 35% for billion-scale datasets
Contributed to core Ubuntu virtualization and cloud orchestration tools, specifically focusing on LXD and QEMU integration
Maintained Canonical's distributed microk8s projects, leading the transition to a more modular architecture
Developed automated kernel performance testing suites in Python, reducing regression detection time by 40%
Architected a distributed snapshots service for LXD using Go, enhancing data durability for clustered environments
Scaled Wayfair's checkout and catalog APIs to support high traffic volume during peak events like Way Day
Migrated monolithic PHP systems to modular Python and Next.js services using a strangler fig pattern
Optimized catalog PostgreSQL databases reducing query times by 50% through advanced indexing and query refactoring
Built a real-time inventory synchronization service using Kafka and Node.js for global stock management
Built Java microservices for HubSpot's marketing automation tools, processing millions of contact events daily
Developed responsive components for the dashboard frontend using React, improving user engagement metrics
Designed a highly scalable email deliverability monitoring system that reduced bounce rates by 15%
Implemented OAuth2.0 integrations for third-party CRM extensions, ensuring secure data exchange
Assisted in distributed system testing and monitoring architectures for Google Cloud Platform services
Optimized internal log aggregation pipelines, reducing processing latency for infrastructure health metrics
Contributed to open-source benchmarking tools used by the Site Reliability Engineering team

zetabarber-platform.title: ZetaBarber Platform
zetabarber-platform.description: Comprehensive discovery and booking platform for local barbers. Engineered with Next.js and Node.js for SEO-optimized performance. Leveraged shadcn/ui and Radix UI primitives for an accessible, premium-feel UX. Integrated Stripe for secure payments and Twilio for automated appointment reminders.
zetabarber-platform.detailedDescription: ZetaBarber is a full-stack platform designed to revolutionize the local barbering industry. My role involved architecting a highly performant SSR frontend with Next.js and building a scalable backend on AWS. We implemented a sophisticated recommendation engine that connects users with highly-rated barbers based on style preferences and proximity. The platform also features real-time scheduling with double-booking prevention, automated SMS notifications via Twilio, and a robust merchant dashboard for barbers to manage their business.

warmly-ai-gtm.title: Warmly AI GTM Platform
warmly-ai-gtm.description: Enterprise-grade AI-native GTM platform. Built a high-performance React frontend synchronized with a .NET Core backend via SignalR. Orchestrated LLM agents using LangChain to automate lead research, person-level intent detection, and personalized email sequencing.
warmly-ai-gtm.detailedDescription: At Warmly, we built an AI-driven Go-To-Market platform that empowers sales teams with real-time visitor identification and intent detection. I led the development of a complex multi-agent system that autonomously researches prospects and drafts personalized outreach. The system leverages state-of-the-art LLMs and a custom .NET Core backend to maintain high throughput and reliability. Our frontend integration with SignalR ensures that sales reps receive instantaneous updates as visitors land on their sites, providing a significant edge in conversion rates.

gmelius-email-collaboration.title: Gmelius Collaboration Suite
gmelius-email-collaboration.description: AI-powered shared inbox for enterprise teams. Architected the frontend with React and Redux, deployed on highly available AWS infrastructure. Implemented real-time collaboration features and AI/LLM fine-tuning for automated email triaging and smart drafting.
gmelius-email-collaboration.detailedDescription: Gmelius transforms Gmail into a powerful team collaboration workspace. As a primary architect, I focused on the real-time synchronization of shared inboxes across distributed teams. We implemented a sophisticated conflict resolution system to ensure data consistency and leveraged LLMs to provide intelligent email summaries and suggested replies. The architecture is built for high availability on AWS, serving thousands of global enterprise clients with minimal latency. We also integrated advanced analytics to help teams optimize their communication workflows.
